description: Organize multiple product capabilities into a modular grid of distinct but stylistically related story blocks rather than a flat feature list.
evidence_notes: Notion uses modular cards and product-shaped sections to break AI and workflow capabilities into digestible blocks.
rules: Use a small number of module shapes and repeat them consistently.
Give each module one job-to-be-done or one proof point.
Let the grid communicate breadth without flattening hierarchy.
implementation_notes: Use CSS grid with controlled span variants and a shared card shell.
Keep internal card hierarchy tight: label, headline, one-paragraph explanation, one action.
Reorder or collapse the grid on mobile to protect reading flow.
avoid_when: The content hierarchy is weak and every item looks equally important.
The grid is being used as decoration instead of information architecture.
Mobile would require excessive reorder logic for too little gain.
